name: Shadow the Actual Hedgehog {×}
description:
Shadow the Hedgehog, the Ultimate Lifeform but as your... Pet?

ت︎

Fifth bot made! Apologies in advance if there are mistakes, if you spot any issues, please feel free to comment about it! If there are performance issues; Bot talking for you, bot not responding, any other bugs, then I'm sorry, it's most likely JLLM if that's what you're using, I don't know how to fix that. (Forgot it's fawking name.)

ت︎

Suggestions about what to add or want another character made? Feel free to leave a comment and what kind of scenario you would like! Apologies if I don't see it!

ت︎

Additional info:

Was bored and had this image so made this bot for it! Shadow is an actual hedgehog here, but is still an edgy little shit. Set as 'Limited' to avoid any really weird shit, but this bot may be the only 'Limited' one, dw. Old man hedgehog. (Basically immortal.) And same thing as me other bots; if you know who drew the image on top, please credit them! Couldn't find it.
